overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077, walking through a neon-lit cyberpunk city corridor transitioning to an outdoor urban plaza. The scene features dense atmospheric lighting with cyan and magenta neon signs, futuristic architecture, and NPCs populating the environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered neon-lit commercial walkway with vending machines

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the corridor passing vending machines and occasional NPCs

notable_agents.action: NPC leaning against glass wall looking at device

entered.detail: futuristic vending machine with red neon lighting and Japanese characters
transparent glass walls with metal frames showing interior spaces
continuous cyan neon strips embedded in the floor
futuristic metal seating along the right wall
horizontal blue neon lighting fixtures on the wall

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a covered cyberpunk commercial walkway illuminated by cyan neon floor strips. A prominent red vending machine stands in the center while glass-fronted shops line the left side. The camera moves forward past metal benches and scattered NPCs standing against walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial corridor with FIXER signage and gathering NPCs

agents.ego_description: navigating through a denser crowd of NPCs gathered near the FIXER sign

notable_agents.action: NPC in yellow jacket and mask standing near the FIXER sign
group of NPCs conversing in the middle of the walkway

entered.detail: large neon arrow sign with FIXER text pointing right
wall covered in cyberpunk-style graffiti and posters
illuminated digital screen displaying menu items

segments.scene_description: The corridor continues with increased pedestrian density near a prominent FIXER neon sign. The right wall features graffiti and posters while NPCs gather in small groups. The camera passes blue trash bins and digital menu boards as the environment maintains its enclosed, neon-lit atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: stairwell transition with green emergency lighting

events.description: entering stairwell area leaving main commercial corridor
ambient lighting shifts from bright cyan neon to dim green emergency lights

agents.ego_description: climbing concrete stairs toward an upper level exit

notable_agents.action: NPC with crossed arms standing in the shadows near the stairs

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase leading upward with green lighting
steam emitting from vents in the floor and walls
illuminated green exit sign above doorway
large white industrial piping running along the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The environment transitions to a concrete stairwell with dim green emergency lighting replacing the bright neon. Steam vents create atmospheric fog as the camera ascends the stairs. Industrial pipes line the ceiling and a lone NPC stands in the shadows with arms crossed.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with steam vents and large neon signage

events.description: exiting enclosed building into open-air urban plaza
camera tilts upward to view large building signage

agents.ego_description: walking through the plaza observing surroundings and looking up at building architecture

notable_agents.action: group of colorfully dressed NPCs conversing near the entrance
parked cars visible along the distant street

entered.detail: massive yellow lightning bolt neon sign on building facade
open concrete ground area with illuminated edge strips
futuristic vehicles parked along the street
large illuminated advertisement screen on building
bright pink neon strips framing a shop entrance

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges into a wide-open urban plaza with steam rising from ground vents and bright neon signage dominating the view. Groups of NPCs gather near a shop entrance framed by pink neon arches. The camera continues forward then tilts upward to reveal a massive yellow lightning bolt sign on the building facade, with parked cars visible in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a neon-saturated commercial corridor through a dim industrial transition and into a sprawling urban plaza. It begins in a covered walkway illuminated by cyan floor strips, moving past glass-fronted shops and a red vending machine toward a denser crowd gathered under a bright FIXER sign. The scene then shifts as the camera leaves the neon glow to ascend a concrete stairwell, where the lighting turns a dim emergency green and steam vents create a thick atmospheric fog. As the camera emerges from the stairs, the environment opens into a wide plaza filled with rising steam and pink neon arches. The movement continues forward through groups of pedestrians before finally tilting upward to reveal a massive yellow lightning bolt sign towering over the city skyline.
